title: 8 Modifying or Canceling a BPRP Arrangement
body_text:
8	Modifying or Canceling a BPRP Arrangement
8.1	Modifying a BPRP Arrangement
Corporate Creditors can modify their existing BPRP arrangement as follows:
Change the lead bank (if changing lead bank from another financial institution to Central 1)
Corporate Creditor Identification Number (CCIN) name change
To modify a BPRP arrangement:
Provide the Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing, Form 2533, to the business member. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing, Form 2533
Advise the business member to:
ГўВҲВ’
Insert their logo on the document and enter the required information.
ГўВҲВ’
Complete Section B, Changes to CCIN Arrangement section with the requested changes.
ГўВҲВ’
Sign the letter and provide the original to your financial institution.
Send the signed copy of the Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing, Form 2533, to your provincial central as directed in Chapter 7, Sending BPRP Service Requests.
Related Information
Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing,
Form 2533
8.2	Cancelling a BPRP Arrangement
A Corporate Creditor must provide written notice to cancel their BPRP arrangement.
The Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310, provides official notification to participating financial institutions that the Corporate Creditor is cancelling the BPRP service agreement with Central 1.
Proceed as follows to obtain the Letter of Direction to cancel BPRP services:
Provide the Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310, to the business member. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310
Advise the business member to enter:
ГўВҲВ’
The current date
ГўВҲВ’
The Corporate Creditor name
ГўВҲВ’
The effective date of cancellation
ГўВҲВ’
The applicable CCIN
Send the signed Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310, as described in Chapter 7, Sending BPRP Service Requests.
Central 1 will cancel the CCIN and remove the biller from the Central 1 bill payment system. Central 1 will advise the other participating financial institutions of the cancellation and to remove the biller from their bill payment systems.
Related Information
Letter of Direction ГўВҖВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation,
Form 9310
END
